titleStmt.title: SII 30.185: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 185. (A.R. No. 261 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa I: Year 48, Māsi, Su. di. (mistake for ba.di.) Monday, Sittirai: 1118 A.D. Monday, Feb. 11

summary.p: Incomplete. This inscription begins with the praśasti of Kulōttuṅgachōḻadēva I and registers an agreement made by certain Śivabrāhmanas of the temple of Pōndaiuḍaiyār at Diṉachintāmaṇi-chatūrvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Dāmarkōṭṭam, with the Srimāhēsvara-kaṇkāṇiseyvār, kōil-vāriyapperumakkaḷ and the karaṇattār, for burning two lamps from the interest on gold received from a native of Paruttikkuḍi, a sub division of Mīseṅgiḷi-nāḍu in Diṉachintāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu of Sōḻamaṇḍalam. The names of the temple priests are mentioned in the inscription. Another fragment is also available at the same place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilavamalar makaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīṉavar
ṉilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Ēṉai maṉṉavaririyaluṟṟiḻitarat tikkaṉaittu taṉ cakaṉaṭā(r)tti vijabhiyekamRead- cakkaranaṭātti vijayābhiṣekampaṇṇi virasiṅhāsaṉa
ttu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṉmarāṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpa
tteṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmar koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu tiṉacintāmaṇi caturvetimaṅkalattu
Uṭaiyār śrīpontai Uṭaiyār koyilil civapirāmmaṇaṉ dakṣiṇā mūrttipaṭṭaṉum tiricciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉum tiruvuṇāyaka paṭṭa
ṉum cūriyatevapaṭṭaṉum pontai(ntai)ṉāyaka paṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom śrīkoyilil śrīmāheśvara kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkoyil
vāriyap perumakkaḷukkum karaṇattāṉukkum tīṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvāṇṭu mācimācattu pūrvapakṣattu tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum citti
raiyum peṟṟa nāḷ coḻamaṇṭalattu cintāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu mīceṅkiḷi nāṭṭu parittikkuṭi parittikkuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ koyil koṇ
poṉ koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka canti yiraṇṭukku Erikkak kaṭavomāṉa viḷakku Iraṇṭukkum kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu nuūṟu Ik

parācavan tirumaṇi ku vacāna teva
vamanasa pūjai Āka 3 meṟku Iv vūr
paṭikku dakṣiṇāmūrtti n Eḻuttu-cūriyateva pa
ciṟṟampala paṭṭan Eḻuttu karuvuṉāyaka paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ip
ṭṭukkuṭuttom Ivvūravarom Ippaṭikku tiripuva
viḷakku Iraṇṭum Erikka kaṭavomāka cammatittu ti
ṉāṟu Ikkācu Oṉṟum mutalākak koṇṭu
Digital edition of SII 30.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
